allow: PowerShell($go = \(Get-Command go -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $go\) { $c = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Go\\bin\\go.exe"; if \(Test-Path $c\) { $env:Path += ";$env:ProgramFiles\\Go\\bin"; $go = $c } }; if \(-not $go\) { "GO_NOT_FOUND" } else { & go version; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\backend"; & go mod tidy; if \($?\) { "---BUILD---"; & go build ./... ; if \($?\) { "BUILD_OK" } } })
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\frontend"; & npx vite build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\frontend"; & npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; "---TSC---"; & npx tsc -b 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; "TSC_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\frontend"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules, package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\frontend"; & npx tsc -b 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; "TSC_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; "---VITE---"; & npx vite build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|built|transformed" | Select-Object -First 10; "VITE_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $pr = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killing PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($pr.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "STILL IN USE" } else { "Port 8080 free" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\frontend"; & npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "---TSC---"; & npx tsc -b 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30; "TSC_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\jfras\\OneDrive\\Documents\\VS Repos\\3d-builder\\frontend"; & npx vite build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|built|transformed" | Select-Object -First 6; "VITE_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
